opinion.h1: COHEN v. WILMINGTON HOUSING AUTHORITY, 398 U.S. 921 (1970)
opinion.h2: Samuel COHEN et ux., appellants, v. WILMINGTON HOUSING AUTHORITY. No. 1449.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: The appeal is dismissed for want of jurisdiction. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.[ Cohen v. Wilmington Housing Authority 398 U.S. 921 (1970) ]
